allow: PowerShell(docker compose exec -T -e PYTHONPATH=/app backend python /tmp/test_ingest_v1.py)

PowerShell(docker compose exec -T db psql -U factory -d factory -c "SELECT s.jalali_date, s.shift, sv.name AS supervisor, lsr.line_number, lsr.input_feed_tonnage AS feed, lsr.production_tonnage AS prod, lsr.recovery, l.code AS load, lsr.ton_per_hour AS tph, lsr.flocculant_consumption_grams AS flocc_g, lsr.flocculant_type AS flocc FROM line_shift_reports lsr JOIN shifts s ON s.id=lsr.shift_id LEFT JOIN supervisors sv ON sv.id=s.supervisor_id LEFT JOIN loads l ON l.id=lsr.load_id WHERE s.jalali_date IN \('1405/01/12','1404/02/15','1402/04/20','1401/08/25'\) ORDER BY s.date, s.shift, lsr.line_number;")

PowerShell(docker compose exec -T db psql -U factory -d factory -c "TRUNCATE filter_press_downtimes, input_feed_downtimes, factory_downtimes, line_shift_reports, shifts, loads, supervisors RESTART IDENTITY CASCADE;")
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T backend alembic -c migrations/alembic.ini upgrade head)
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T db psql -U factory -d factory -c "\\d shifts")

PowerShell(docker compose exec -T db psql -U factory -d factory -c "SELECT s.jalali_date, s.shift, COALESCE\(LEFT\(s.downtime_description,60\),'<null>'\) AS note, lsr.line_number AS ln, lsr.input_feed_tonnage AS feed, lsr.production_tonnage AS prod, lsr.dry_weight_recovery AS dwr, lsr.k80_size_primary_ballmill AS k80_pm, lsr.primary_mill_60 AS pm60 FROM line_shift_reports lsr JOIN shifts s ON s.id=lsr.shift_id WHERE s.jalali_date IN \('1404/10/05','1403/01/06','1403/04/09','1404/12/12'\) ORDER BY s.jalali_date, s.shift, lsr.line_number;")
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T -e PYTHONPATH=/app backend python /tmp/ingest_all.py)

PowerShell(docker compose exec -T db psql -U factory -d factory -c "SELECT s.jalali_date, s.shift, lsr.line_number AS ln, lsr.load_segment AS seg, l.code AS load, lsr.input_feed_tonnage AS feed, lsr.production_tonnage AS prod, lsr.operation_hour AS op_h, lsr.ton_per_hour AS tph FROM line_shift_reports lsr JOIN shifts s ON s.id=lsr.shift_id LEFT JOIN loads l ON l.id=lsr.load_id WHERE s.jalali_date IN \('1404/08/17','1404/08/18','1403/06/28'\) ORDER BY s.jalali_date, s.shift, lsr.line_number, lsr.load_segment;")

PowerShell(docker compose exec -T db psql -U factory -d factory -c "SELECT s.jalali_date, s.shift, s.date AS gregorian FROM shifts s WHERE s.jalali_date IN \('1402/05/19','1402/05/20','1402/05/22'\) ORDER BY s.jalali_date, s.shift;")

PowerShell(docker compose exec -T db psql -U factory -d factory -c "SELECT s.jalali_date, lsr.line_number AS ln, lsr.input_feed_tonnage AS feed, lsr.operation_hour AS op_h, lsr.ton_per_hour AS tph, lsr.filter_press_operation_hour AS fp_op FROM line_shift_reports lsr JOIN shifts s ON s.id=lsr.shift_id WHERE \(s.jalali_date='1404/03/15' AND s.shift='night'\) OR \(s.jalali_date='1404/04/02' AND s.shift='night'\) ORDER BY s.jalali_date, lsr.line_number;")
